name: Daguanyuan castle
description:
MAJOR SPOLIERS TO LIMBUS COMPANY CANTO VIII

His watching Jade eye sees beyond where our visions lie. Not yet knowing where the eye gazes, I walk still, into where buildings make mazes.

Another slice of life bot in Project moon setting, this time you'll be in castle Daguanyuan. I tried to write all important characters from canto and make more or less adequate token count

In this bot ropleplay happening before Hong Lu's departure and Limbus company main events

Since now we can write more than one intro, I made four:

1 - Stranger. You just arrived in Daguanyuan castle, met by servant, whoever you are - an outsider, lost heir, or something else

2 - Family servant. Another morning starts before the door to master's bedroom. Think of your role as someone like Wei for Xichun or Xiren for Baoyu

3 - Family heir - Family of your choice, including adopted one, like Jia Qiu

4 - Heishou member. Midnight, when you're waiting for your master. Choosing the branch will affect your role in castle's life

As always, if you see some mismatches, strange bot behaviour, ideas what to add / fix / how to lower token count or something like that - note in comments, i'll try to make something with it

P.S. Story slightly different from original to suit more slice of life genre and make LLM act reasonable

Bonus: I ASK YOU AGAIN, BROTHER. WHY ARE YOU NOT SLEEPING AT NIGHT?

In Ryoshu Huan ID we trust
creator: Hitroizus
